title: Monsoon Mexican Tortilla Quesadilla
description: A twist on traditional Mexican quesadillas, this dish incorporates the unique flavors of Veracruz, including sansho pepper, crispy tortillas, and a tangy slaw made with pickled red onion and cilantro.
instructions: Preheat a griddle or frying pan over medium heat.
In a small bowl, mix together the cheese blend and sansho pepper.
In a separate bowl, mix together the cabbage, pickled red onion, and chopped cilantro.
Brush both sides of the tortillas with olive oil.
Place a few leaves of collard greens on a work surface and place a tortilla in the center.
Spoon a quarter of the cheese blend mixture onto half of the tortilla.
Top with a quarter of the cabbage mixture.
Fold the tortilla in half to enclose the filling.
Place the quesadilla on the preheated griddle and cook for 2 minutes or until crispy and golden brown.
Flip the quesadilla and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Serve immediately and sprinkle with salt to taste.
